name: ReList
longDescription: Inventory, pricing, and financial tracking for Vinted resellers. Built for Lily (lily.dor) — daily kanban flow for shipping and repricing, AI photo descriptions, Chrome-extension ingest from Vinted, and profit analytics with full backup/restore.
features: Today's Flow kanban: ship, update, review
Inventory with thumbnails, filters, bulk actions
Profit analytics with category and source breakdowns
Deal finder for flip opportunities from watched items
Backup and restore of the full database
